name: firebase-hosting-service
description: Firebase Hosting Service - Deploy web projects with unique subdomains

scripts.deploy:functions: cd functions && npm run build && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.deploy:all: bash deploy.sh && cd functions && npm run build && firebase deploy --only functions
scripts.build:flutter: cd flutter_app && flutter clean && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release
scripts.build:functions: cd functions && npm install && npm run build
